title: clematis fusca subsp. violacea
intro: Clematis fusca subsp. violacea is a flowering plant species in the buttercup family, native to the Balkan Peninsula and parts of Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis fusca subsp. violacea include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
